creator: BERTUS
description: For years, Andrei Evilenko eluded the obsessive Detective Lesiev and the psychiatric profiler Aron Richter. Spurred on by his rabid fury at the gradual crumbling of his precious Soviet Union, Evilenko is a man who will live, die and kill as a communist.
subject: Malcom McDowell
Rostov
VOSE
title: 2004 Evilenko ( VOSE)
